name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Change To AWS Trail Logging Configurations
notes: This rule triggers when there are alerts on configuration changes to the Cloud Trail logs.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Change To AWS Trail Logging Configurations on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail
when the event QID is one of the following (88750838) Update Trail
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Change To AWS Trail Logging Configurations on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail
AND when the event QID is one of the following (88750838) Update Trail
